pg144-p1:
solve his problem. To you, some of the ideas which it contains are novel. Perhaps you are not quite in sympathy with the
approach we suggest. By no means do we offer it as the last word on this subject, but so far as we are concerned, it has
worked with us. After all, are you not looking for results rather than methods? Whether your employee likes it or not,
he will learn the grim truth about alcoholism. That won't hurt him a bit, even though he does not go for this remedy.
pg144-p2-s1: We suggest you draw the book to the attention of the doctor who is to attend your patient during treatment.
pg144-p2-s2:
If the book
is read the moment the patient is able, while acutely depressed, realization of his condition may come to him.
pg144-p2:
We suggest you draw the book to the attention of the doctor who is to attend your patient during treatment. If the book
is read the moment the patient is able, while acutely depressed, realization of his condition may come to him.
pg144-p3-s1: We hope the doctor will tell the patient the truth about his condition, whatever that happens to be.
pg144-p3-s2:
When the man is
presented with this volume it is best that no one tell him he must abide by its suggestions.
pg144-p3-s3:
The man must decide for
himself.
pg144-p3:
We hope the doctor will tell the patient the truth about his condition, whatever that happens to be. When the man is
presented with this volume it is best that no one tell him he must abide by its suggestions. The man must decide for
himself.
pg144-p4-s1: You are betting, of course, that your changed attitude plus the contents of this book will turn the trick.
pg144-p4-s2:
In some cases
it will, and in others it may not.
pg144-p4-s3: But we think that if you persevere, the percentage of successes will gratify you.
pg144-p4-s4:
As
our work spreads and our numbers increase, we hope your employees may be put in personal contact with some of us.
pg144-p4-s5: Meanwhile, we are sure a great deal can be accomplished by the use of the book alone.
pg144-p4:
You are betting, of course, that your changed attitude plus the contents of this book will turn the trick. In some cases
it will, and in others it may not. But we think that if you persevere, the percentage of successes will gratify you. As
our work spreads and our numbers increase, we hope your employees may be put in personal contact with some of us. Meanwhile, we are sure a great deal can be accomplished by the use of the book alone.
pg144-p5-s1: On your employee's return, talk with him.
pg144-p5-s2: Ask him if he thinks he has the answer.
pg144-p5-s3:
If he feels free to discuss his
problems with you, if he knows you understand
